anand.comment: Powerton Engineering made the process of going solar seamless and easy. Their team handled everything from start to finish, and we're thrilled with the results.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: I am glad I chose Powerton Engineering for our installation, and I would not hesitate to recommend them to any of my friends.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: Excellent quality products and outstanding customer service. The technical expertise of the team is impressive and highly professional.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: Working with Powerton Engineering was a fantastic experience. Their automation solutions transformed our manufacturing process and improved efficiency by 35%. Highly recommended for industrial automation projects.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: Outstanding service and technical support! The team provided exceptional guidance throughout our solar project implementation. Their professional approach and timely delivery exceeded our expectations completely.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: Powerton Engineering delivered exactly what they promised. The instrumentation system they installed has been working flawlessly for over two years. Their after-sales support is remarkable and always responsive.

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completes Major Automation Project for Leading Manufacturing Plant
sampleArticle.excerpt: Successfully implemented comprehensive industrial automation system reducing operational costs by 30% and improving efficiency by 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering has successfully completed a comprehensive industrial automation project for one of India's leading manufacturing facilities. This project represents a significant milestone in our commitment to delivering cutting-edge automation solutions that drive operational excellence.
content.technicalText: The project involved the integration of advanced PLC systems, SCADA implementation, and comprehensive instrumentation solutions. Our team worked closely with the client to ensure minimal disruption to ongoing operations while implementing state-of-the-art automation technology.
content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering delivered beyond our expectations. The new automation system has transformed our operations, and we're seeing immediate benefits in efficiency and cost reduction. Their professional approach and technical expertise were exceptional.
content.futureText: Based on the success of this implementation, the client has already engaged Powerton Engineering for phase two of their automation journey, which will expand the system to additional production lines.
content.conclusionText: This project demonstrates our capability to handle complex industrial automation challenges and deliver measurable results that directly impact our clients' bottom line.

anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: Powerton工程让我们的太阳能项目变得无缝且简单。他们的团队从头到尾处理一切，我们对结果非常满意。

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: 我很高兴为我们的安装选择了Powerton工程，我毫不犹豫地向我的任何朋友推荐他们。

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: 优质的产品和出色的客户服务。团队的技术专长令人印象深刻且高度专业。

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: 与Powerton工程合作是一次美妙的体验。他们的自动化解决方案改变了我们的制造流程，提高了35%的效率。强烈推荐工业自动化项目。

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: 出色的服务和技术支持！团队在我们的太阳能项目实施过程中提供了卓越的指导。他们的专业方法和及时交付完全超出了我们的期望。

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: Powerton工程完全兑现了他们的承诺。他们安装的仪表系统已经完美运行了两年多。他们的售后支持非常出色且始终响应迅速。

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completes Major Automation Project for Leading Manufacturing Plant
sampleArticle.excerpt: Successfully implemented comprehensive industrial automation system reducing operational costs by 30% and improving efficiency by 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering has successfully completed a comprehensive industrial automation project for one of India's leading manufacturing facilities. This project represents a significant milestone in our commitment to delivering cutting-edge automation solutions that drive operational excellence.
content.technicalText: The project involved the integration of advanced PLC systems, SCADA implementation, and comprehensive instrumentation solutions. Our team worked closely with the client to ensure minimal disruption to ongoing operations while implementing state-of-the-art automation technology.
content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering delivered beyond our expectations. The new automation system has transformed our operations, and we're seeing immediate benefits in efficiency and cost reduction. Their professional approach and technical expertise were exceptional.
content.futureText: Based on the success of this implementation, the client has already engaged Powerton Engineering for phase two of their automation journey, which will expand the system to additional production lines.
content.conclusionText: This project demonstrates our capability to handle complex industrial automation challenges and deliver measurable results that directly impact our clients' bottom line.

story.title: 我们的旅程与愿景
story.description1: 宝尔顿工程成立于2008年，以通过创新和卓越赋能工业的愿景，一直处于工业自动化和电气工程解决方案的前沿。我们的旅程始于一个简单而强大的使命：提供推动工业增长和运营效率的尖端工程解决方案。
story.description2: 多年来，我们从一个小型工程公司发展成为中国及全球工业的可信赖合作伙伴。我们经验丰富的工程师和技术专家团队不懈努力，提供不仅满足而且超越客户期望的解决方案。

mission.title: 我们的使命
mission.description: 提供创新、可靠和可持续的工程解决方案，使我们的客户能够实现运营卓越并推动工业增长。

services.title: 我们的服务
services.subtitle: 全面的工业工程解决方案

descriptions.installation-commissioning: 为电气面板、PLC、SCADA系统和工业设备提供专业安装和调试服务，包括完整的系统验证。
descriptions.maintenance-repair: 为电气系统、控制面板和工业自动化设备提供全面的预防性和应急维护服务。
descriptions.calibration-testing: 为压力、温度、流量仪表和控制系统提供NABL认证的精密校准和测试服务。
descriptions.technical-support: 24/7/365技术支持服务，包括远程诊断、现场故障排除和紧急响应。
descriptions.custom-solutions: 为独特的工业需求提供定制工程解决方案，包括定制MCC面板、自动化系统和过程控制解决方案。
descriptions.consultation-training: PLC编程、HMI开发和工业自动化的专家技术咨询和实践培训课程。
descriptions.supply-chain-management: 电气元件和备件的综合供应链管理。授权经销商网络确保正品零件。
descriptions.solar-epc: 为1kW到1MW+项目提供完整的太阳能工程、采购和建设服务。MNRE批准的设计，25年性能保证。

responses.services: हमारी सेवाओं में स्थापना, रखरखाव, अंशांकन, तकनीकी सहायता और कस्टम समाधान शामिल हैं। कौन सी सेवा आपकी रुचि है?
responses.contact: आप हमसे +91-9911315121 पर संपर्क कर सकते हैं या info@powertonengineering.com पर ईमेल कर सकते हैं। हमारा कार्यालय दिल्ली, भारत में स्थित है।
responses.quote: मुझे आपको कोटेशन दिलाने में खुशी होगी! कृपया हमारे कोटेशन पेज पर जाएं या मुझे अपनी आवश्यकताएं बताएं।
responses.support: हमारी तकनीकी सहायता टीम यहां आपकी सहायता के लिए है! कृपया अपना तकनीकी प्रश्न या समस्या का वर्णन करें।

seo.companyDescription: भारत में अग्रणी औद्योगिक स्वचालन और विद्युत इंजीनियरिंग कंपनी। पावर प्लांट स्वचालन, सौर प्रतिष्ठान और विनिर्माण नियंत्रण प्रणालियों में विशेषज्ञता।

anand.name: आनंद अवस्थी
anand.comment: पावर्टन इंजीनियरिंग ने सोलर लगाने की प्रक्रिया को सुविधाजनक और आसान बना दिया। उनकी टीम ने शुरू से अंत तक सब कुछ संभाला, और हम परिणामों से बहुत खुश हैं।

sanjay.name: संजय पाटील
sanjay.comment: मुझे खुशी है कि मैंने हमारी स्थापना के लिए पावर्टन इंजीनियरिंग को चुना, और मैं अपने दोस्तों को इनकी सिफारिश करने में कोई झिझक नहीं करूंगा।

rhea.name: रिया शर्मा
rhea.comment: उत्कृष्ट गुणवत्ता के उत्पाद और बेहतरीन ग्राहक सेवा। टीम की तकनीकी विशेषज्ञता प्रभावशाली और अत्यधिक पेशेवर है।

priya.name: प्रिया मेहता
priya.comment: पावरटन इंजीनियरिंग के साथ काम करना एक शानदार अनुभव था। उनके स्वचालन समाधान ने हमारी विनिर्माण प्रक्रिया को बदल दिया और दक्षता में 35% सुधार किया। औद्योगिक स्वचालन परियोजनाओं के लिए अत्यधिक अनुशंसित।

kavya.name: काव्या सिंह
kavya.comment: उत्कृष्ट सेवा और तकनीकी सहायता! टीम ने हमारी सौर परियोजना कार्यान्वयन के दौरान असाधारण मार्गदर्शन प्रदान किया। उनके पेशेवर दृष्टिकोण और समय पर डिलीवरी ने हमारी अपेक्षाओं को पूरी तरह से पार किया।

rajesh.name: राजेश कुमार
rajesh.comment: पावरटन इंजीनियरिंग ने वही दिया जो उन्होंने वादा किया था। उन्होंने जो इंस्ट्रूमेंटेशन सिस्टम स्थापित किया है वह दो साल से भी ज्यादा समय से निर्दोष रूप से काम कर रहा है। उनका बिक्री के बाद सहायता उल्लेखनीय और हमेशा उत्तरदायी है।

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completes Major Automation Project for Leading Manufacturing Plant
sampleArticle.excerpt: Successfully implemented comprehensive industrial automation system reducing operational costs by 30% and improving efficiency by 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering has successfully completed a comprehensive industrial automation project for one of India's leading manufacturing facilities. This project represents a significant milestone in our commitment to delivering cutting-edge automation solutions that drive operational excellence.
content.technicalText: The project involved the integration of advanced PLC systems, SCADA implementation, and comprehensive instrumentation solutions. Our team worked closely with the client to ensure minimal disruption to ongoing operations while implementing state-of-the-art automation technology.
content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering delivered beyond our expectations. The new automation system has transformed our operations, and we're seeing immediate benefits in efficiency and cost reduction. Their professional approach and technical expertise were exceptional.
content.futureText: Based on the success of this implementation, the client has already engaged Powerton Engineering for phase two of their automation journey, which will expand the system to additional production lines.
content.conclusionText: This project demonstrates our capability to handle complex industrial automation challenges and deliver measurable results that directly impact our clients' bottom line.

descriptions.installation-commissioning: विद्युत पैनल, पीएलसी, स्काडा सिस्टम और औद्योगिक उपकरण के लिए पेशेवर स्थापना और कमीशनिंग सेवाएं।
descriptions.maintenance-repair: विद्युत सिस्टम, कंट्रोल पैनल और औद्योगिक स्वचालन उपकरण के लिए व्यापक निवारक और आपातकालीन रखरखाव सेवाएं।
descriptions.calibration-testing: दबाव, तापमान, प्रवाह उपकरण और नियंत्रण सिस्टम के लिए NABL-प्रमाणित सटीक अंशांकन और परीक्षण सेवाएं।
descriptions.technical-support: रिमोट डायग्नोस्टिक्स, ऑन-साइट समस्या निवारण और आपातकालीन प्रतिक्रिया के साथ 24/7/365 तकनीकी सहायता सेवाएं।
descriptions.custom-solutions: कस्टम एमसीसी पैनल, स्वचालन सिस्टम और प्रक्रिया नियंत्रण समाधान सहित अनूठी औद्योगिक आवश्यकताओं के लिए अनुकूलित इंजीनियरिंग समाधान।
descriptions.consultation-training: पीएलसी प्रोग्रामिंग, एचएमआई विकास और औद्योगिक स्वचालन के लिए विशेषज्ञ तकनीकी परामर्श और व्यावहारिक प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम।
descriptions.supply-chain-management: विद्युत घटकों और स्पेयर पार्ट्स के लिए व्यापक आपूर्ति श्रृंखला प्रबंधन। अधिकृत वितरक नेटवर्क वास्तविक पार्ट्स सुनिश्चित करता है।
descriptions.solar-epc: 1kW से 1MW+ परियोजनाओं के लिए पूर्ण सोलर इंजीनियरिंग, खरीद और निर्माण सेवाएं। MNRE-अनुमोदित डिज़ाइन के साथ 25-वर्ष की प्रदर्शन गारंटी।

priya.name: Priya Mehta

story.title: Nuestro Viaje y Visión
story.description1: Establecida con la visión de empoderar a las industrias a través de la innovación y la excelencia, Powerton Engineering ha estado a la vanguardia de las soluciones de automatización industrial e ingeniería eléctrica desde 2008. Nuestro viaje comenzó con una misión simple pero poderosa: proporcionar soluciones de ingeniería de vanguardia que impulsen el crecimiento industrial y la eficiencia operacional.
story.description2: A lo largo de los años, hemos crecido de una pequeña empresa de ingeniería a un socio de confianza para industrias en toda la India y más allá. Nuestro equipo de ingenieros experimentados y expertos técnicos trabaja incansablemente para entregar soluciones que no solo cumplan sino que superen las expectativas de nuestros clientes. Nos enorgullecemos de nuestra capacidad para entender desafíos industriales complejos y proporcionar soluciones innovadoras y sostenibles.

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completa Proyecto Mayor de Automatización para Planta Manufacturera Líder
sampleArticle.excerpt: Implementación exitosa de sistema integral de automatización industrial reduciendo costos operacionales en 30% y mejorando eficiencia en 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering ha completado exitosamente un proyecto integral de automatización industrial para una de las instalaciones manufactureras líderes de la India. Este proyecto representa un hito significativo en nuestro compromiso de entregar soluciones de automatización de vanguardia que impulsan la excelencia operacional.

achievements.safety: Cero incidentes de seguridad durante implementación
achievements.uptime: 100% tiempo de funcionamiento del sistema desde puesta en marcha

content.technicalText: El proyecto involucró la integración de sistemas PLC avanzados, implementación SCADA, y soluciones de instrumentación integrales. Nuestro equipo trabajó estrechamente con el cliente para asegurar mínima interrupción a las operaciones en curso mientras implementaba tecnología de automatización de última generación.

technologies.scada: SCADA avanzado con monitoreo en tiempo real

content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering entregó más allá de nuestras expectativas. El nuevo sistema de automatización ha transformado nuestras operaciones, y estamos viendo beneficios inmediatos en eficiencia y reducción de costos. Su enfoque profesional y experiencia técnica fueron excepcionales.
content.futureText: Basado en el éxito de esta implementación, el cliente ya ha contratado a Powerton Engineering para la fase dos de su jornada de automatización, que expandirá el sistema a líneas de producción adicionales.
content.conclusionText: Este proyecto demuestra nuestra capacidad de manejar desafíos complejos de automatización industrial y entregar resultados medibles que impactan directamente los resultados de nuestros clientes.

descriptions.installation-commissioning: Servicios profesionales de instalación y puesta en marcha para paneles eléctricos, PLCs, sistemas SCADA y equipos industriales con validación completa del sistema.
descriptions.maintenance-repair: Servicios integrales de mantenimiento preventivo y de emergencia para sistemas eléctricos, paneles de control y equipos de automatización industrial.
descriptions.calibration-testing: Servicios de calibración y pruebas de precisión certificados por NABL para instrumentos de presión, temperatura, flujo y sistemas de control.
descriptions.technical-support: Servicios de soporte técnico 24/7/365 con diagnósticos remotos, solución de problemas en sitio y respuesta de emergencia.
descriptions.custom-solutions: Soluciones de ingeniería personalizadas para requisitos industriales únicos, incluyendo paneles MCC personalizados, sistemas de automatización y soluciones de control de procesos.
descriptions.consultation-training: Consultoría técnica experta y programas de capacitación práctica para programación PLC, desarrollo HMI y automatización industrial.
descriptions.supply-chain-management: Gestión integral de cadena de suministro para componentes eléctricos y repuestos. La red de distribuidores autorizados garantiza piezas genuinas.
descriptions.solar-epc: Servicios completos de Ingeniería, Adquisiciones y Construcción Solar para proyectos de 1kW a 1MW+. Diseños aprobados por MNRE con garantía de rendimiento de 25 años.

anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: جعلت هندسة باورتون عملية الانتقال إلى الطاقة الشمسية سلسة وسهلة. تولى فريقهم كل شيء من البداية إلى النهاية، ونحن سعداء جداً بالنتائج.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: أنا سعيد لأنني اخترت هندسة باورتون لتركيبنا، ولن أتردد في التوصية بهم لأي من أصدقائي.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: منتجات ممتازة الجودة وخدمة عملاء متميزة. الخبرة التقنية للفريق مثيرة للإعجاب ومهنية للغاية.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: العمل مع هندسة باورتون كان تجربة رائعة. حلول الأتمتة الخاصة بهم غيرت عملية التصنيع لدينا وحسنت الكفاءة بنسبة 35%. موصى به بشدة لمشاريع الأتمتة الصناعية.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: خدمة متميزة ودعم فني رائع! قدم الفريق توجيهاً استثنائياً طوال تنفيذ مشروع الطاقة الشمسية لدينا. نهجهم المهني والتسليم في الوقت المحدد فاق توقعاتنا تماماً.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: هندسة باورتون وفت بما وعدت به تماماً. نظام الأجهزة الذي قاموا بتركيبه يعمل بشكل مثالي لأكثر من عامين. دعمهم ما بعد البيع رائع ومتجاوب دائماً.

story.title: رحلتنا ورؤيتنا
story.description1: تأسست برؤية تمكين الصناعات من خلال الابتكار والتميز، أصبحت شركة بواورتون للهندسة مزودًا رائدًا للحلول الكهربائية والأجهزة في جميع أنحاء الهند.
story.description2: من مقرنا الرئيسي في نويدا، نخدم العملاء على الصعيد الوطني بحلول هندسية شاملة تشمل أتمتة العمليات والأجهزة والتركيب الشمسي وخدمات الصيانة.

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completes Major Automation Project for Leading Manufacturing Plant
sampleArticle.excerpt: Successfully implemented comprehensive industrial automation system reducing operational costs by 30% and improving efficiency by 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering has successfully completed a comprehensive industrial automation project for one of India's leading manufacturing facilities. This project represents a significant milestone in our commitment to delivering cutting-edge automation solutions that drive operational excellence.
content.technicalText: The project involved the integration of advanced PLC systems, SCADA implementation, and comprehensive instrumentation solutions. Our team worked closely with the client to ensure minimal disruption to ongoing operations while implementing state-of-the-art automation technology.
content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering delivered beyond our expectations. The new automation system has transformed our operations, and we're seeing immediate benefits in efficiency and cost reduction. Their professional approach and technical expertise were exceptional.
content.futureText: Based on the success of this implementation, the client has already engaged Powerton Engineering for phase two of their automation journey, which will expand the system to additional production lines.
content.conclusionText: This project demonstrates our capability to handle complex industrial automation challenges and deliver measurable results that directly impact our clients' bottom line.

copyright.madeWith: Fait avec 💙 par l'équipe Powerton Engineering

anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: Powerton Engineering a rendu le processus d'adoption de l'énergie solaire transparent et facile. Leur équipe a tout géré du début à la fin, et nous sommes ravis des résultats.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: Je suis content d'avoir choisi Powerton Engineering pour notre installation, et je n'hésiterais pas à les recommander à n'importe lequel de mes amis.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: Produits d'excellente qualité et service client exceptionnel. L'expertise technique de l'équipe est impressionnante et hautement professionnelle.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: Travailler avec Powerton Engineering a été une expérience fantastique. Leurs solutions d'automatisation ont transformé notre processus de fabrication et amélioré l'efficacité de 35%. Fortement recommandé pour les projets d'automatisation industrielle.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: Service exceptionnel et support technique ! L'équipe a fourni des conseils exceptionnels tout au long de la mise en œuvre de notre projet solaire. Leur approche professionnelle et leur livraison ponctuelle ont complètement dépassé nos attentes.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: Powerton Engineering a livré exactement ce qu'ils avaient promis. Le système d'instrumentation qu'ils ont installé fonctionne parfaitement depuis plus de deux ans. Leur support après-vente est remarquable et toujours réactif.

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completes Major Automation Project for Leading Manufacturing Plant
sampleArticle.excerpt: Successfully implemented comprehensive industrial automation system reducing operational costs by 30% and improving efficiency by 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering has successfully completed a comprehensive industrial automation project for one of India's leading manufacturing facilities. This project represents a significant milestone in our commitment to delivering cutting-edge automation solutions that drive operational excellence.
content.technicalText: The project involved the integration of advanced PLC systems, SCADA implementation, and comprehensive instrumentation solutions. Our team worked closely with the client to ensure minimal disruption to ongoing operations while implementing state-of-the-art automation technology.
content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering delivered beyond our expectations. The new automation system has transformed our operations, and we're seeing immediate benefits in efficiency and cost reduction. Their professional approach and technical expertise were exceptional.
content.futureText: Based on the success of this implementation, the client has already engaged Powerton Engineering for phase two of their automation journey, which will expand the system to additional production lines.
content.conclusionText: This project demonstrates our capability to handle complex industrial automation challenges and deliver measurable results that directly impact our clients' bottom line.

descriptions.installation-commissioning: Services professionnels d'installation et de mise en service pour panneaux électriques, PLCs, systèmes SCADA et équipements industriels avec validation complète du système.
descriptions.maintenance-repair: Services complets de maintenance préventive et d'urgence pour systèmes électriques, panneaux de contrôle et équipements d'automatisation industrielle.
descriptions.calibration-testing: Services de calibration et de tests de précision certifiés NABL pour instruments de pression, température, débit et systèmes de contrôle.
descriptions.technical-support: Services de support technique 24/7/365 avec diagnostics à distance, dépannage sur site et réponse d'urgence.
descriptions.custom-solutions: Solutions d'ingénierie sur mesure pour exigences industrielles uniques incluant panneaux MCC personnalisés, systèmes d'automatisation et solutions de contrôle de processus.
descriptions.consultation-training: Consultation technique experte et programmes de formation pratique pour programmation PLC, développement HMI et automatisation industrielle.
descriptions.supply-chain-management: Gestion complète de la chaîne d'approvisionnement pour composants électriques et pièces de rechange. Réseau de distributeurs autorisés garantit des pièces authentiques.
descriptions.solar-epc: Services complets d'Ingénierie, Approvisionnement et Construction Solaire pour projets de 1kW à 1MW+. Designs approuvés MNRE avec garantie de performance de 25 ans.

anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: A Powerton Engineering tornou o processo de adoção da energia solar perfeito e fácil. Sua equipe cuidou de tudo do início ao fim, e estamos entusiasmados com os resultados.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: Estou feliz por ter escolhido a Powerton Engineering para nossa instalação, e não hesitaria em recomendá-los a qualquer um dos meus amigos.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: Produtos de excelente qualidade e atendimento ao cliente excepcional. A experiência técnica da equipe é impressionante e altamente profissional.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: Trabalhar com a Powerton Engineering foi uma experiência fantástica. Suas soluções de automação transformaram nosso processo de fabricação e melhoraram a eficiência em 35%. Altamente recomendado para projetos de automação industrial.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: Serviço excepcional e suporte técnico! A equipe forneceu orientação excepcional durante a implementação do nosso projeto solar. Sua abordagem profissional e entrega pontual superaram completamente nossas expectativas.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: A Powerton Engineering entregou exatamente o que prometeram. O sistema de instrumentação que instalaram tem funcionado perfeitamente por mais de dois anos. Seu suporte pós-venda é notável e sempre responsivo.

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completa Grande Projeto de Automação para Planta de Fabricação Líder
sampleArticle.excerpt: Implementou com sucesso sistema abrangente de automação industrial reduzindo custos operacionais em 30% e melhorando eficiência em 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering completou com sucesso um projeto abrangente de automação industrial para uma das principais instalações de fabricação da Índia. Este projeto representa um marco significativo em nosso compromisso de entregar soluções de automação de ponta que impulsionam a excelência operacional.

achievements.efficiency: 45% de melhoria na eficiência de produção
achievements.safety: Zero incidentes de segurança durante a implementação
achievements.uptime: 100% de tempo de atividade do sistema desde o comissionamento

content.technicalText: O projeto envolveu a integração de sistemas PLC avançados, implementação SCADA e soluções abrangentes de instrumentação. Nossa equipe trabalhou em estreita colaboração com o cliente para garantir disrupção mínima às operações em andamento enquanto implementava tecnologia de automação de última geração.

technologies.scada: SCADA avançado com monitoramento em tempo real

content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering entregou além de nossas expectativas. O novo sistema de automação transformou nossas operações, e estamos vendo benefícios imediatos em eficiência e redução de custos. Sua abordagem profissional e expertise técnica foram excepcionais.
content.futureText: Com base no sucesso desta implementação, o cliente já contratou a Powerton Engineering para a fase dois de sua jornada de automação, que expandirá o sistema para linhas de produção adicionais.
content.conclusionText: Este projeto demonstra nossa capacidade de lidar com desafios complexos de automação industrial e entregar resultados mensuráveis que impactam diretamente a linha de fundo de nossos clientes.

descriptions.installation-commissioning: Serviços profissionais de instalação e comissionamento para painéis elétricos, PLCs, sistemas SCADA e equipamentos industriais com validação completa do sistema.
descriptions.maintenance-repair: Serviços abrangentes de manutenção preventiva e de emergência para sistemas elétricos, painéis de controle e equipamentos de automação industrial.
descriptions.calibration-testing: Serviços de calibração e teste de precisão certificados NABL para instrumentos de pressão, temperatura, vazão e sistemas de controle.
descriptions.technical-support: Serviços de suporte técnico 24/7/365 com diagnósticos remotos, solução de problemas no local e resposta de emergência.
descriptions.custom-solutions: Soluções de engenharia personalizadas para requisitos industriais únicos, incluindo painéis MCC customizados, sistemas de automação e soluções de controle de processos.
descriptions.consultation-training: Consultoria técnica especializada e programas de treinamento prático para programação PLC, desenvolvimento HMI e automação industrial.
descriptions.supply-chain-management: Gestão abrangente da cadeia de suprimentos para componentes elétricos e peças de reposição. Rede de distribuidores autorizados garante peças genuínas.
descriptions.solar-epc: Serviços completos de Engenharia, Aquisição e Construção Solar para projetos de 1kW a 1MW+. Projetos aprovados MNRE com garantia de desempenho de 25 anos.

anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: Powerton Engineering сделала процесс перехода на солнечную энергию бесшовным и легким. Их команда позаботилась обо всем от начала до конца, и мы в восторге от результатов.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: Я рад, что выбрал Powerton Engineering для нашей установки, и не стал бы колебаться, рекомендуя их любому из моих друзей.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: Отличное качество продукции и выдающееся обслуживание клиентов. Техническая экспертиза команды впечатляет и высокопрофессиональна.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: Работа с Powerton Engineering была фантастическим опытом. Их решения автоматизации трансформировали наш производственный процесс и повысили эффективность на 35%. Настоятельно рекомендуется для проектов промышленной автоматизации.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: Выдающийся сервис и техническая поддержка! Команда предоставила исключительное руководство на протяжении всей реализации нашего солнечного проекта. Их профессиональный подход и своевременная доставка полностью превзошли наши ожидания.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: Powerton Engineering поставила именно то, что обещала. Система контрольно-измерительных приборов, которую они установили, работает безупречно уже более двух лет. Их послепродажная поддержка замечательна и всегда отзывчива.

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completes Major Automation Project for Leading Manufacturing Plant
sampleArticle.excerpt: Successfully implemented comprehensive industrial automation system reducing operational costs by 30% and improving efficiency by 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering has successfully completed a comprehensive industrial automation project for one of India's leading manufacturing facilities. This project represents a significant milestone in our commitment to delivering cutting-edge automation solutions that drive operational excellence.
content.technicalText: The project involved the integration of advanced PLC systems, SCADA implementation, and comprehensive instrumentation solutions. Our team worked closely with the client to ensure minimal disruption to ongoing operations while implementing state-of-the-art automation technology.
content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering delivered beyond our expectations. The new automation system has transformed our operations, and we're seeing immediate benefits in efficiency and cost reduction. Their professional approach and technical expertise were exceptional.
content.futureText: Based on the success of this implementation, the client has already engaged Powerton Engineering for phase two of their automation journey, which will expand the system to additional production lines.
content.conclusionText: This project demonstrates our capability to handle complex industrial automation challenges and deliver measurable results that directly impact our clients' bottom line.

descriptions.installation-commissioning: Профессиональные услуги по установке и вводу в эксплуатацию электрических панелей, ПЛК, систем SCADA и промышленного оборудования с полной проверкой системы.
descriptions.maintenance-repair: Комплексные услуги профилактического и аварийного обслуживания электрических систем, панелей управления и оборудования промышленной автоматизации.
descriptions.calibration-testing: Сертифицированные NABL услуги точной калибровки и тестирования приборов давления, температуры, расхода и систем управления.
descriptions.technical-support: Услуги технической поддержки 24/7/365 с удаленной диагностикой, устранением неполадок на месте и реагированием на чрезвычайные ситуации.
descriptions.custom-solutions: Индивидуальные инженерные решения для уникальных промышленных требований, включая индивидуальные панели MCC, системы автоматизации и решения управления процессами.
descriptions.consultation-training: Экспертные технические консультации и практические программы обучения по программированию ПЛК, разработке HMI и промышленной автоматизации.
descriptions.supply-chain-management: Комплексное управление цепочкой поставок электрических компонентов и запасных частей. Сеть авторизованных дистрибьюторов гарантирует оригинальные детали.
descriptions.solar-epc: Полные услуги по солнечному проектированию, закупкам и строительству для проектов от 1кВт до 1МВт+. Проекты, одобренные MNRE, с 25-летней гарантией производительности.

anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: Powerton Engineering ilifanya mchakato wa kutumia nishati ya jua kuwa rahisi na nyepesi. Timu yao ilishughulikia kila kitu kutoka mwanzo hadi mwisho, na tunafurahi sana na matokeo.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: Nimefurahi kuchagua Powerton Engineering kwa usakinishaji wetu, na singependa kutoa shaka kuwapendelea kwa yeyote wa marafiki zangu.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: Bidhaa za ubora wa hali ya juu na huduma ya wateja ya kipekee. Utaalamu wa kiufundi wa timu ni wa kuvutia na wa kitaaluma.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: Kufanya kazi na Powerton Engineering kulikuwa uzoefu wa ajabu. Masuluhisho yao ya otomatiki yalibadilisha mchakato wetu wa utengenezaji na kuboresha ufanisi kwa asilimia 35. Inapendekezwa sana kwa miradi ya otomatiki ya viwandani.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: Huduma ya kipekee na msaada wa kiufundi! Timu ilitoa mwongozo wa kipekee wakati wa utekelezaji wa mradi wetu wa jua. Mbinu yao ya kitaaluma na utoaji wa wakati ulizidi matarajio yetu kabisa.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: Powerton Engineering ilitoa haswa kile walichokuwa wameahidi. Mfumo wa ala za kipimo waliousakinisha umekuwa ukifanya kazi vizuri kwa zaidi ya miaka miwili. Msaada wao baada ya mauzo ni wa ajabu na daima wa kujibu.

responses.services: Huduma zetu ni pamoja na usakinishaji, matengenezo, usahihi, usaidizi wa kiufundi na mifumo maalum. Ni huduma gani unayoipenda?
responses.contact: Unaweza kutupigia simu +91-9911315121 au kututumia barua pepe info@powertonengineering.com. Ofisi yetu iko Delhi, India.
responses.quote: Ningependa kukusaidia kupata nukuu! Tafadhali tembelea ukurasa wetu wa nukuu au unipe mahitaji yako.
responses.support: Timu yetu ya usaidizi wa kiufundi ipo hapa kukusaidia! Tafadhali eleza swali lako la kiufundi au tatizo.

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completes Major Automation Project for Leading Manufacturing Plant
sampleArticle.excerpt: Successfully implemented comprehensive industrial automation system reducing operational costs by 30% and improving efficiency by 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering has successfully completed a comprehensive industrial automation project for one of India's leading manufacturing facilities. This project represents a significant milestone in our commitment to delivering cutting-edge automation solutions that drive operational excellence.
content.technicalText: The project involved the integration of advanced PLC systems, SCADA implementation, and comprehensive instrumentation solutions. Our team worked closely with the client to ensure minimal disruption to ongoing operations while implementing state-of-the-art automation technology.
content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering delivered beyond our expectations. The new automation system has transformed our operations, and we're seeing immediate benefits in efficiency and cost reduction. Their professional approach and technical expertise were exceptional.
content.futureText: Based on the success of this implementation, the client has already engaged Powerton Engineering for phase two of their automation journey, which will expand the system to additional production lines.
content.conclusionText: This project demonstrates our capability to handle complex industrial automation challenges and deliver measurable results that directly impact our clients' bottom line.

services.title: Huduma Zetu
services.subtitle: Suluhisho Kamili za Uhandisi wa Viwandani

technical-support.onsite-response: Mwitikio wa Mahali pa kazi ndani ya saa 4

descriptions.installation-commissioning: Huduma za kitaalamu za usakinishaji na kuweka utumikaji kwa paneli za umeme, PLC, mifumo ya SCADA na vifaa vya viwandani pamoja na uthibitisho kamili wa mfumo.
descriptions.maintenance-repair: Huduma kamili za matengenezo ya kuzuia na za dharura kwa mifumo ya umeme, paneli za udhibiti na vifaa vya otomatiki ya viwandani.
descriptions.calibration-testing: Huduma za urekebishaji na uchunguzi wa usahihi zilizoidhinishwa na NABL kwa vifaa vya shinikizo, joto, mtiririko na mifumo ya udhibiti.
descriptions.technical-support: Huduma za msaada wa kiufundi wa 24/7/365 pamoja na uchunguzi wa mbali, utatuzi wa matatizo mahali pa kazi na mwitikio wa dharura.
descriptions.custom-solutions: Suluhisho za uhandisi zilizobinafsishwa kwa mahitaji ya kipekee ya viwandani ikiwa ni pamoja na paneli za MCC za kipekee, mifumo ya otomatiki na suluhisho za udhibiti wa michakato.
descriptions.consultation-training: Ushauri wa kiufundi wa utaalamu na programu za mafunzo ya vitendo kwa upangaji wa PLC, maendeleo ya HMI na otomatiki ya viwandani.
descriptions.supply-chain-management: Usimamizi kamili wa mnyororo wa uongozaji kwa viungo vya umeme na vipengele vya ziada. Mtandao wa wasambazaji walioidhinishwa unahakikisha vipengele halisi.
descriptions.solar-epc: Huduma kamili za Uhandisi, Ununuzi na Ujenzi wa Jua kwa miradi ya 1kW hadi 1MW+. Miundo iliyoidhinishwa na MNRE pamoja na dhamana ya utendaji wa miaka 25.

anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: Powerton Engineering ta sanya aikin amfani da makamashin rana ya zama mai sauƙi da kuma sauƙi. Ƙungiyarsu ta ɗauki kula da komai daga farko zuwa ƙarshe, kuma muna jin daɗi sosai da sakamakon.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: Na yi farin ciki da zaɓar Powerton Engineering don shigarwar mu, kuma ba zan dadin yin wa kowane ɗan uwana shawara ba.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: Samfuran inganci na musamman da sabis na abokan ciniki na musamman. Ƙwarewar fasaha ta ƙungiyar tana da ban sha'awa kuma tana da ƙwarewa sosai.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: Yin aiki tare da Powerton Engineering ya kasance gogewa mai ban mamaki. Hanyoyin sarrafa su ta atomatik sun canza tsarin samarwa mu kuma sun inganta inganci da kashi 35%. An ba da shawarar sosai don ayyukan sarrafa masana'antu ta atomatik.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: Sabis na musamman da tallafin fasaha! Ƙungiyar ta ba da jagora na musamman yayin aiwatar da aikinmu na rana. Hanyarsu ta sana'a da isar da lokaci sun wuce tsammaninmu gaba ɗaya.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar

sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering Completes Major Automation Project for Leading Manufacturing Plant
sampleArticle.excerpt: Successfully implemented comprehensive industrial automation system reducing operational costs by 30% and improving efficiency by 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering has successfully completed a comprehensive industrial automation project for one of India's leading manufacturing facilities. This project represents a significant milestone in our commitment to delivering cutting-edge automation solutions that drive operational excellence.
content.technicalText: The project involved the integration of advanced PLC systems, SCADA implementation, and comprehensive instrumentation solutions. Our team worked closely with the client to ensure minimal disruption to ongoing operations while implementing state-of-the-art automation technology.
content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering delivered beyond our expectations. The new automation system has transformed our operations, and we're seeing immediate benefits in efficiency and cost reduction. Their professional approach and technical expertise were exceptional.
content.futureText: Based on the success of this implementation, the client has already engaged Powerton Engineering for phase two of their automation journey, which will expand the system to additional production lines.
content.conclusionText: This project demonstrates our capability to handle complex industrial automation challenges and deliver measurable results that directly impact our clients' bottom line.
